title: The Sound of Spring on the Breeze

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan racks up the wins. Gone is the
self-doubting Umamusume who once worried she
was unworthy of the Mejiro name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She races with pure determination, focusing
exclusively on victory. It seems that watching Ines
Fujin run has helped her figure out her own path
forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And it's not just Mejiro Ryan. Everyone who sees
Ines Fujin run finds themselves getting fired up.
Her running fills countless people with energy and
enthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I imagine the cheers at the Satsuki Sho will be
even louder. Everyone's hoping to see her do her
best... and win.
